name: Nikhoj
overview: Fearless and bold DCP Brinda Basu becomes desperate to track down the person behind her daughter's disappearance. Amidst the truth and lies, will Brinda be able to get back her daughter fighting against the odds?

trailers.title: Official Trailer - Nikhoj (নিখোঁজ) | Swastika Mukherjee, Tota Roy Choudhury | 11th August | hoichoi
